calendar.matters:
Petition For Confirmation Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by zoom for petitioner.

Mr. Bresler confirmed that he filed a declaration indicating that there are no heirs. The Petition for Confirmation of Trust Assets is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition For Confirmation Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Continued To Apr-17-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Confirmation Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Dec-19-2022 Continued To Feb-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler, via Zoom, for Teri A. Hillenbrand, Petitioner.

The court queries counsel regarding the outstanding Examiner's notes. Counsel offers advocacy regarding the venue issue and reports that he confirmed with his client that the Settlor did not have a Memoranda of Personal Property. The court confirms that it has no issue with venue, but that counsel will need to file a verified supplement to clear the remaining issues indicated in the Examiner's notes.

The subject matter is continued to Feb-27-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
